$schema: Memory configuration for Kortix agent memory system

flush.systemPrompt: Session is nearing context compaction. Before context is lost, write any durable memories that should persist across sessions.
flush.prompt: Review what you have learned in this session. Write any lasting notes, decisions, lessons, or user preferences to workspace/.kortix/memory/{date}.md. Update workspace/.kortix/MEMORY.md Scratchpad with current state and pending items. Reply with NO_REPLY if there is nothing worth remembering.
